name: Zinfandeli's Tortilla Soup - S.a. Express - Arlene Lightsey
recipeInstructions:
1. Garnish Notes: Cook chicken breasts and dice them.
2. In a large Dutch oven, heat vegetable oil over medium heat.
3. Add garlic and 8 chopped corn tortillas to the pot. Sauté until the tortillas are tender.
4. Add onion puree, tomato paste, cayenne pepper, cumin, bay leaves, tomato paste, chicken base, and water. Stir to combine.
5. Simmer the mixture for 20 minutes over low heat.
6. Remove bay leaves and stir in chopped cilantro and epazote.
7. Blend the soup briefly using a food processor until smooth.
8. Strain the soup through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl, discarding solids.
9. Adjust seasoning with salt and white pepper to taste.
10. Serve the soup hot, garnished with diced chicken, avocado, fried tortilla strips, and shredded Monterey Jack cheese in individual serving bowls.
Makes 8-10 servings of approximately 6 ounces each.
